themes: Long wait times are the rule, not the exception—the majority of contacts have been waiting over 90 days, with many exceeding 200 days, signaling an urgent need to clear this backlog and reset expectations before trust erodes further.

Multi-location franchise and property management brands dominate the list, suggesting that scalable location-level management, streamlined reporting across portfolios, and consistent governance are the most common underlying pain points driving these conversations.

Several accounts—including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Ford, and Avenue5 Residential—appear multiple times with different contacts and escalating wait times, indicating that unresolved concerns are spreading within these organizations and should be prioritized to protect account health.
